tasks.instruction: Search for wood burning tutorials, filter to beginner-level tutorials from the last 3 months, sort results by rating from high to low, open the top tutorial, and post a comment saying "Planning to try this technique this weekend!" on it.

expected_values.comment_text: Planning to try this technique this weekend!

tasks.instruction: In the "Beginner Tools" forum, first review existing threads about choosing a first chisel set on a budget, then post a new topic in the main beginner tools subforum titled "Advice on my first chisel set under $100" that asks for recommendations under a $100 budget, includes the sentence "I am looking for a beginner-friendly chisel set under $100 for small woodworking art projects.", and uses chisels and beginner as tags.

expected_values.thread_title: Advice on my first chisel set under $100
expected_values.body_must_include: I am looking for a beginner-friendly chisel set under $100 for small woodworking art projects.
